# mxroute_spam_blacklist (Data Source)

Lists a domain's spam blacklist — the sender addresses and patterns always rejected. For one entry, use the `mxroute_spam_blacklist_entry` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_spam_blacklist" "example" {
  domain = "example.com"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain whose spam blacklist to list.

### Read-Only

- `entries` (List of String) The blacklisted sender addresses and patterns.
- `id` (String) Data source identifier — the domain name.
